name: Arjun Patel
notes: Discussing credit underwriting module licensing. Customer requested multi-region pricing grids.

profile.overview: Arjun is director of IT at Zenith FinTech, based out of Mumbai. They have 450 employees.

activities.title: Requirements Gathering Call
activities.desc: Agreed on core features. They need support for OAuth integration.

aiSuggestions: Focus on security standards as financial sector client.
Highlight quick deployment speeds to meet their Q3 deadline.

name: Sarah Connor
notes: Contract draft under legal review. Pricing discussions completed.

profile.overview: Sarah is CTO of Cyberdyne Systems, an automation and intelligence firm based out of California.

activities.title: Executive Pricing Discussion
activities.desc: Agreed on enterprise terms and custom SLAs.

aiSuggestions: Customer is sensitive to auto-renewal clauses. Confirm they are comfortable with standard CJS parameters.

name: Rajesh Kumar
notes: Sent general product brochure. Looking for inventory dispatch tools.

profile.overview: Rajesh is the Operations Head at Delta Logistics in Delhi, operating 15 cargo nodes.

activities.title: Quick Intro Call
activities.desc: Gave brief product overview. Rajesh requested a live demo with his operations team.

aiSuggestions: Emphasize map and transit tracking integrations.
Suggest starting with our standard SaaS plan with a 14-day free trial.

name: Ananya Sen
notes: Submitted demo request form from landing page.

profile.overview: Ananya is the founder of Pinnacle Edutech, an online university prep platform.
aiSuggestions: Educator sector is pricing sensitive. Emphasize standard plan and startup tier discounts.

name: Bruce Wayne
notes: Highly qualified lead looking for state-of-the-art telemetry and tracking software.

profile.overview: Wayne Enterprises is a massive multi-national conglomerate with key offices in Gotham.

activities.title: NDA & Security Briefing
activities.desc: Completed introductory presentation on data encryption and sandboxing rules.

aiSuggestions: Client values complete offline database sandboxing and strict local session storage.
Highlight our encryption and local memory caching layers.
